name: 高度不平衡的交易模式
condition: node_features.get('out_degree', 0) > params.get('out_degree_threshold', 2) + 2 * self.threshold and node_features.get('in_degree', 0) < params.get('in_degree_threshold', 1) + 0.5 * (1 - self.threshold) and node_features.get('balance', 0) < params.get('balance_threshold', 0)

name: 循环交易模式
condition: any(tx['type'] == 'out' and any(otx['type'] == 'in' and otx['from'] == tx['to'] and abs(float(otx['timestamp']) - float(tx['timestamp'])) < params.get('time_window', 86400) for otx in node_features.get('transactions', [])) for tx in node_features.get('transactions', []) )

name: 资金分层转移
condition: node_features.get('in_tx_count', 0) > params.get('in_tx_threshold', 5) and node_features.get('avg_in_amount', 0) < params.get('avg_in_threshold', 1e17) and node_features.get('max_out_amount', 0) > node_features.get('total_in', 0) * params.get('out_ratio', 0.8)

name: 大额交易后分散转出
condition: node_features.get('max_out_amount', 0) > params.get('amount_threshold', 5e19) * self.threshold and node_features.get('out_degree', 0) > node_features.get('in_degree', 0) * (params.get('degree_factor', 3) - 2 * self.threshold)

name: 休眠后突然活跃
condition: len(node_features.get('transactions', [])) > params.get('tx_count_threshold', 10) and (max(float(tx['timestamp']) for tx in node_features.get('transactions', [])) - min(float(tx['timestamp']) for tx in node_features.get('transactions', []))) > params.get('total_time_span', 30)*86400 and any(float(tx['timestamp']) - float(node_features.get('transactions', [])[i-1]['timestamp']) > params.get('inactive_span', 14)*86400 for i, tx in enumerate(node_features.get('transactions', [])) if i > 0)

name: 交易金额变化小
condition: node_features.get('out_amount_variation', 1) < params.get('variation_threshold', 0.3) - 0.2 * self.threshold and node_features.get('out_tx_count', 0) > params.get('tx_count_threshold', 2) + self.threshold

name: 大量整额交易
condition: node_features.get('round_amount_ratio', 0) > params.get('ratio_threshold', 0.3) + 0.3 * self.threshold and node_features.get('out_tx_count', 0) > params.get('tx_count_threshold', 2) + self.threshold

name: 高频小额交易
condition: node_features.get('tx_frequency', 0) > params.get('frequency_threshold', 30) * self.threshold and node_features.get('avg_out_amount', 0) < params.get('amount_threshold', 1e18) * (1 - self.threshold)

name: 高风险网络结构
condition: node_features.get('clustering', 0) > params.get('clustering_threshold', 0.7) * self.threshold and node_features.get('pagerank', 0) > params.get('pagerank_threshold', 0.05) * self.threshold

name: 高转出转入比
condition: node_features.get('degree_ratio', 0) > params.get('ratio_threshold', 3) * self.threshold and node_features.get('total_out', 0) > params.get('amount_threshold', 1e19) * self.threshold

name: 低聚类高介数
condition: node_features.get('clustering', 0) < params.get('clustering_threshold', 0.2) * (1 - self.threshold) and node_features.get('pagerank', 0) > params.get('pagerank_threshold', 0.15) * self.threshold

name: 交易金额接近阈值
condition: (node_features.get('avg_out_amount', 0) > params.get('lower_threshold', 9e17) * self.threshold and node_features.get('avg_out_amount', 0) < params.get('upper_threshold', 1.1e18) * self.threshold) and node_features.get('out_tx_count', 0) > params.get('tx_count_threshold', 5) * self.threshold

name: 交易对手分散
condition: node_features.get('out_degree', 0) > params.get('degree_threshold', 10) * self.threshold and (node_features.get('out_tx_count', 0) / node_features.get('out_degree', 1)) < params.get('tx_per_degree_threshold', 1.5) * (1 - self.threshold)
